nasb.text: Then he passed away, and lo, he was no more; I sought for him, but he could not be found.

esv.text: But he passed away, and behold, he was no more; though I sought him, he could not be found.

cnv.text: 但他很快就消逝，不再存在了； 我尋找他，卻找不到。

ccb.text: 再一看， 他已经消失得无影无踪， 无处可寻。

csbs.text: 但他很快就消逝了，看哪，他不复存在！ 虽然我寻找他，却找不到。
